dj_text: This is That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. We put the 'fun' in 'functional audio delivery system.' That was Mer Prestige Mer Pastis. Changing the channel. Just kidding, there's only one channel. Kom Og Tag Mine Øjne.
commercial_text: This break was supposed to be an ad but we forgot to sell one. So here's 10 seconds of me making mouth noises. mmm.
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: Frequency stabilized. For now. The walls between kosmos are thin today.
title: Kom Og Tag Mine Øjne
